title: BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BITS Pilani Digital Technologies:
BITS Pilani Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BITS Pilani Digital Technologies!
